# 1Way Home Services - Tax & Real Estate Services El Cajon

Professional tax preparation, IRS audit support, bookkeeping, and real estate tax consulting in El Cajon and San Diego, CA. 6 years in business, 100+ repeat customers, 100% satisfaction rate. Dual expertise in tax and real estate/mortgage services for homeowners, investors, and businesses.

## Contact
(619) 716-9193 | info@1wayhomeservices.com | https://1wayhomeservices.com
Location: El Cajon, San Diego County, CA | Hours: By Appointment
Free consultations available (in-person, phone, Zoom)

## Services & Pricing

Tax Planning & Advisory - Year-round strategy, deduction optimization, business structure analysis, quarterly planning | Free consultation
Tax Filing - Federal/state returns for individuals & businesses, e-file, direct deposit | From $199 (5-7 day turnaround)
Payroll Tax - Quarterly filings, W-2/1099 prep, compliance | From $150/mo
Bookkeeping - Monthly records, reconciliation, P&L, Balance Sheet | From $200/mo (saves 10+ hours/month)
IRS Help & Audit - Audit representation, notice response, penalty abatement, payment plans | Free consultation
Real Estate Tax - Capital gains planning, 1031 exchanges, depreciation strategies | Free consultation
Mortgage Consulting - Pre-approval, refinancing, debt planning, home buying | Free consultation
